description_long: This is a hand-knitted stuffed toy resembling a monkey, crafted from a textured yarn material in a muted olive green color with beige accents on the hands, feet, and face. The toy features a rounded head with small, circular ears on each side and a simple, stitched face with two dark eyes and a wide, slightly curved mouth. Its arms are long and extend outward, while the legs are shorter and bent at the knees, giving it a relaxed, seated appearance. The body is plump and soft, with visible knit patterns throughout, adding to its tactile appeal. The overall construction suggests a plush, squeezable form, likely filled with a lightweight stuffing material. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A hand-knitted, olive green stuffed monkey with beige accents, long outstretched arms, and a simple stitched face. The toy is soft, plump, and seated, with visible knit texture and no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monkey's face, outstretched arms, and both legs, with clear visibility of the facial features and knit texture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, one ear, and the length of the arm and leg on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and both arms extended outward, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, ear, and the right arm and leg, similar to the left side but mirrored.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a simple stitched mouth that curves slightly upward and two small, dark eyes. There are no eyebrows or other expressive features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting with arms outstretched to the sides and legs bent forward, giving a relaxed and welcoming posture.
